ai.issueType: CTA button focus indicator removed without replacement
ai.description: The `#cta-btn:focus` selector sets `outline: none` without providing a visible alternative such as box-shadow, border-color change, or non-zero outline. Keyboard users cannot see when the button has focus.

ai.issueType: Form control focus indicator removed without replacement
ai.description: The `input:focus, select:focus, textarea:focus` selector removes the outline and sets `border-color: #ddd`, which is identical to the default border-color (#ddd) in line 195, resulting in no visible change. No alternative focus indicator is provided.

ai.issueType: Gallery image focus indicator removed without replacement
ai.description: The `.gallery-grid img:focus` selector removes the outline without providing a visible alternative. If images are made interactive (e.g., with tabindex), keyboard users lose focus visibility.

ai.issueType: Section link focus indicator removed with insufficient replacement
ai.description: The `section a:focus` selector removes the outline and relies solely on `text-decoration: underline` for visibility. Text-decoration is not a sufficient replacement for a focus ring per WCAG 2.2 Focus Visible requirements (box-shadow, distinct border, or non-zero outline required).

ai.issueType: Checkbox touch target below minimum size
ai.description: The `.form-check-input` selector sets `width: 1rem; height: 1rem;` (16px × 16px), which is below the minimum 24×24px touch target size required by WCAG 2.5.5 Target Size (Enhanced). Users with motor impairments may have difficulty activating the control.

ai.issueType: Toggle thumb motion animation lacks reduced-motion override
ai.description: The `.toggle-thumb` selector uses `transition: transform` which causes spatial movement, but there is no `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)` override to disable this animation. Users with vestibular disorders may experience discomfort.

ai.issueType: Modal entrance animation lacks reduced-motion override
ai.description: The `.modal` selector uses `animation: modal-in` which includes transform (scale and translateY) causing spatial movement, but lacks a reduced-motion override. Users with vestibular disorders may experience discomfort.

ai.issueType: Dropdown menu animation lacks reduced-motion override
ai.description: The `.dropdown-menu` selector uses `animation: dropdown-in` which includes transform (translateY) causing spatial movement, but lacks a reduced-motion override.

ai.issueType: Accordion icon transition lacks reduced-motion override
ai.description: The `.accordion-icon` selector uses `transition: transform` for the chevron rotation, causing spatial movement, but lacks a reduced-motion override.

ai.issueType: Card hover/focus transform lacks reduced-motion override
ai.description: The `.card-elevated:hover, .card-elevated:focus-within` selector uses `transform: translateY(-2px)` causing spatial movement on hover/focus, but lacks a reduced-motion override.

ai.issueType: Page enter transition lacks reduced-motion override
ai.description: The `.page-enter-active` selector includes `transform` in its transition, causing spatial movement, but lacks a reduced-motion override.

ai.issueType: Slide-up enter transition lacks reduced-motion override
ai.description: The `.slide-up-enter-active` selector includes `transform` in its transition, causing spatial movement, but lacks a reduced-motion override.

ai.issueType: Insufficient colour contrast on light-text class
ai.description: The `.light-text` selector sets `color: #666` on `background: #f5f5f5`, resulting in a contrast ratio of approximately 2.4:1, which fails the WCAG 2.2 AA requirement of 4.5:1 for normal text. Users with low vision cannot read the text.

ai.issueType: Insufficient colour contrast on header navigation links
ai.description: The `header nav a` selector sets `color: #0066ff` against the header's `background: #003366`, resulting in a contrast ratio of approximately 1.8:1, failing WCAG 2.2 AA. Users cannot read the navigation links.

ai.issueType: Insufficient colour contrast on header navigation button
ai.description: The `header nav button` selector sets `color: #0066ff` on `background: #003366`, resulting in a contrast ratio of approximately 1.8:1, failing WCAG 2.2 AA.

ai.issueType: Insufficient colour contrast on CTA button
ai.description: The `#cta-btn` selector sets `color: #fff` on `background: #ff6b6b`, resulting in a contrast ratio of approximately 2.6:1, failing the 4.5:1 requirement for normal text (16px regular weight).

ai.issueType: Insufficient colour contrast on features heading
ai.description: The `.features h2` selector sets `color: #333` on a background of `#f9f9f9` (from line 136), resulting in a contrast ratio of approximately 4.1:1, failing the 4.5:1 requirement.

ai.issueType: Insufficient colour contrast on submit button
ai.description: The `button[type="submit"]` selector sets `color: #fff` on `background: #007bff`, resulting in a contrast ratio of approximately 3.5:1, failing the 4.5:1 requirement for normal text.

ai.issueType: Insufficient colour contrast on info alert
ai.description: The `.alert-info` selector sets `color: var(--color-info-dark)` (#1d4ed8) on `background: var(--color-info-light)` (#dbeafe), resulting in a contrast ratio of approximately 2.7:1, failing WCAG 2.2 AA.

ai.issueType: Insufficient colour contrast on error alert
ai.description: The `.alert-error` selector sets `color: var(--color-error-dark)` (#b91c1c) on `background: var(--color-error-light)` (#fee2e2), resulting in a contrast ratio of approximately 4.0:1, failing the 4.5:1 requirement.

ai.issueType: Insufficient colour contrast on error toast
ai.description: The `.toast-error` selector sets `color: #fff` on `background: var(--color-error-dark)` (#b91c1c), resulting in a contrast ratio of approximately 3.6:1, failing the 4.5:1 requirement.

ai.issueType: Insufficient colour contrast on data table header
ai.description: The `.data-table th` selector sets `color: var(--color-neutral-600)` (#4b5563) on `background: var(--color-neutral-50)` (#f9fafb), resulting in a contrast ratio of approximately 2.7:1, failing WCAG 2.2 AA.

ai.issueType: Link underline removed without alternative in header navigation
ai.description: The `header nav a` selector sets `text-decoration: none` and provides no non-colour visual differentiator (such as underline on hover/focus or font-weight change) to distinguish links from surrounding text. Users with colour vision deficiencies cannot identify the links.

ai.issueType: Link underline removed without alternative in navbar links
ai.description: The `.navbar-links a` selector sets `text-decoration: none` with no alternative visual indicator on hover or focus within the rule block. Users cannot distinguish links from text without colour vision.

ai.issueType: Link underline removed without alternative in mega menu
ai.description: The `.mega-menu-col a` selector sets `text-decoration: none` with no alternative visual indicator provided in the hover state or elsewhere. Users rely solely on colour to identify links.

ai.issueType: Focus indicator removed without replacement on textarea
ai.description: The base selector 'textarea' has 'outline: none' which removes the default focus ring. No visible alternative (box-shadow, border, or outline) is provided in this rule or a paired :focus rule for this specific selector, making keyboard navigation impossible to track.

ai.issueType: Focus indicator removed without replacement on #cta-btn:focus
ai.description: The '#cta-btn:focus' selector explicitly sets 'outline: none' without providing a visible alternative like box-shadow or border, removing the focus indicator for this button.

ai.issueType: Focus indicator removed without replacement on input:focus
ai.description: The 'input:focus' selector sets 'outline: none'. Although it sets 'border-color: #ddd', the default border is already #ddd (Line 197), so there is no visible change to indicate focus.

ai.issueType: Focus indicator removed without replacement on select:focus
ai.description: The 'select:focus' selector sets 'outline: none'. Although it sets 'border-color: #ddd', the default border is already #ddd (Line 197), so there is no visible change to indicate focus.

ai.issueType: Focus indicator removed without replacement on textarea:focus
ai.description: The 'textarea:focus' selector sets 'outline: none'. Although it sets 'border-color: #ddd', the default border is already #ddd (Line 197), so there is no visible change to indicate focus.

ai.issueType: Focus indicator removed without replacement on .gallery-grid img:focus
ai.description: The '.gallery-grid img:focus' selector sets 'outline: none' without providing a visible alternative, which removes the focus ring if the image is made focusable.

ai.issueType: Focus indicator removed without replacement on section a:focus
ai.description: The 'section a:focus' selector sets 'outline: none'. While it adds 'text-decoration: underline', the sweep criteria require box-shadow, border, or outline for focus replacement to ensure high visibility.

ai.issueType: Motion animation missing prefers-reduced-motion override on .dropdown-menu
ai.description: The '.dropdown-menu' element uses 'animation: dropdown-in' which includes 'transform: translateY', causing spatial movement without a prefers-reduced-motion override.

lighthouse.issueType: Background and foreground colors do not have a sufficient contrast ratio.
lighthouse.description: Low-contrast text is difficult or impossible for many users to read. [Learn how to provide sufficient color contrast](https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/color-contrast).

lighthouse.issueType: Background and foreground colors do not have a sufficient contrast ratio.
lighthouse.description: Low-contrast text is difficult or impossible for many users to read. [Learn how to provide sufficient color contrast](https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/color-contrast).

lighthouse.issueType: Background and foreground colors do not have a sufficient contrast ratio.
lighthouse.description: Low-contrast text is difficult or impossible for many users to read. [Learn how to provide sufficient color contrast](https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/color-contrast).

lighthouse.issueType: Heading elements are not in a sequentially-descending order
lighthouse.description: Properly ordered headings that do not skip levels convey the semantic structure of the page, making it easier to navigate and understand when using assistive technologies. [Learn more about heading order](https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/heading-order).

lighthouse.issueType: Image elements do not have `[alt]` attributes
lighthouse.description: Informative elements should aim for short, descriptive alternate text. Decorative elements can be ignored with an empty alt attribute. [Learn more about the `alt` attribute](https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/image-alt).
